title: Braised Vietnamese Chuck Roast Stir-fry
description: An earthy and light brunch-mood Vietnamese dish featuring halal-friendly chuck roast braised with aromatic herbs and vegetables in a flavorful sauce for an easy-to-make, satisfying meal.

ingredients.name: Leeks
ingredients.notes: Chopped, white and light green parts only

ingredients.name: Fish Stock Cube or Chicken Stock Cube

instructions: Preheat oven to 325°F (160°C). Season chuck roast with salt and pepper.

Heat oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Add garlic, onion, carrots, bell peppers, leeks, soy sauce, fish sauce, stock cube, white pepper powder, and sugar. Stir until well combined and vegetables are slightly softened.
Transfer mixture to an oven-safe dish and top with chuck roast. Bake for 1 hour or until meat is tender (internal temperature should reach at least 145°F/63°C).
Reduce heat to low and stir in more soy sauce if needed. Simmer gently for another 10 minutes.
Serve hot as a side dish or over rice.
